Name: BitSight Risk Findings CCF
Author: KanenasCS - konstantinos_lianos@hotmail.com
Description: The **BitSight Risk Findings CCF** solution ingests normalized WARN and BAD BitSight risk-vector findings for a selected portfolio company into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (RestApiPoller). It includes hunting queries and an analytic rule for monitoring the selected BitSight risk vectors.
